GateDocument.TextWithNodes: "How to channel the ultimate European holiday in your home", "Remember that European holiday you had booked? The one Covid-19 decided wouldn't be going ahead this year. Well, it's time to get even. And you know what they say... don't get mad, get a renovation. While we won't be travelling anytime soon, there are chic ways to incorporate elements of European style into your interiors. More specifically, your kitchen and bathroom. Smartstone's European-inspired range of quartz surfaces have the best of both worlds: beauty and durability. With a selection of surfaces ideal for kitchen and bathroom spaces including benchtops, counters and vanities, Smartstone has something for everyone. And while it might not be a cocktail in Santorini, it will give your kitchen or bathroom a much-needed refresh and update. Made from strength-tested quartz, Smartstone's slabs are designed to be resistant to heat, chipping, cracking and staining. Known as durable solutions to kitchen and bathroom renovations, Smartstone's surfaces are just that: smart. And for those so inclined, Smartstone is equally equipped to work in other parts of the house — the world really is your oyster. To get started, we're 'visiting' the four destinations in the Smartstone Collections, whose names were inspired by European cities, because renovations might not be as glamorous as a holiday, but they are definitely more practical. Santorini. Defined by the beauty of white quartz, the neutral colourways in the Santorini Collection mirror those of the famous Greek island's whitewashed homes. Bringing to life visions of an Aegean escape, a white-as-white surface from the Santorini Collection (inspired by the iconic island skyline) is best paired with like-natural colours, including washed stones and light greys. Or, do as the Greeks do and pair with ocean blues for a truly escapist approach. Milan. Bold and sophisticated, the Milan Collection is all about showing off the uniqueness of the bustling Italian city. Packing a visual punch with its edgy dark colourings, surfaces from the Milan Collection are ideal for creating tone and texture. Make a statement in the bathroom and clad your entire room in a surface from the Milan Collection — it'll be sure to last, and will craft a visual effect that far outweighs regular vanity spaces. Just like the Italians, these stones are not afraid to stand out. Paris. Elegant and enticing, Paris' enduring style never disappoints. Smartstone's Paris Collection is just that: a timeless pick guaranteed to last. Taking cues from Parisian street life and cafe culture, the textured or coloured quartz surfaces will look right at home in any refined kitchen or classic bathroom. Our pick? Pair a quartz slab from the Paris Collection alongside homewares with naturally-leaning colours and textures, like rattan or boucle. Very French indeed. Ooh la la! Toledo. If the energy of Spain is calling your name, go no further than the Smartstone Toledo Collection. Combining the best of the Spanish city's charm and history with the best in modern materials, Toledo's simple (yet inherently intriguing) quartz surfaces will prove a winner. Earthy and creamy, the palette brings to life a chic beige veined quartz — best paired alongside pops of black, brown or dark grey. Visit: Smartstone.com.au"
